cta_order.headline: Any Race. Any Pace. Instantly.
cta_order.subtext: Enter any two values — get everything else live.

cta_order.headline: Tap a Distance, Get Everything
cta_order.subtext: 800m to Marathon shortcuts. One tap fills the distance.

cta_order.headline: Save Every Training Pace
cta_order.subtext: Named presets sync across your devices via iCloud.

cta_order.headline: Your Privacy, Protected.
cta_order.subtext: No accounts. No sign-up. No tracking. Ever.

cta_order.headline: Love It? Tip the Dev.
cta_order.subtext: Every feature included. Optional tips keep the lights on.
